refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target over the agreed evaluation period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR to explicitly state the performance metric (link availability) and the evaluation period clarifies the requirement for design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime and downtime statistics over the evaluation period using telemetry data to verify availability meets or exceeds the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and report link failures promptly.
FR3: Recover or switch to backup link to maintain availability.
FR4: Log link availability metrics for evaluation.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.
DP2: Use robust error detection and correction protocols on the link.
DP3: Continuous link health monitoring and alerting system.
DP4: Centralized link availability logging and reporting service.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.

potential_sources: Link monitoring tightly coupled with failover logic
Failover mechanism depends on network link status
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically groups redundancy and failover to minimize coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes redundant network infrastructure is available and reliable.
Risk that failover delay may impact availability if not optimized.
Assumes monitoring and failover logic can be integrated within the same module.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding explicit error detection DP if failover alone is insufficient.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Responsible for managing teleoperation link connectivity, monitoring, failover, and reporting.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Send link status and availability metrics to NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network interfaces for teleoperation communication.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receive teleoperation commands and tasking data from NGHE Solution.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of link availability logic and minimal diffusion; well aligned with DP.
Contains overall system logic but less focused on link availability specifics.
Limited containment; vehicle hardware interfaces but not responsible for link availability.
Receives alerts but does not manage link availability.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing link availability management in Teleoperation module minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential dependency on NGHE Solution for tasking interface may introduce coupling.
Failover logic complexity may increase module size and risk.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Review interface definitions to ensure minimal coupling and consider splitting failover logic if complexity grows.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FR is clearly decomposed into measurable sub-FRs and the selected DP logically addresses the key requirement of link availability with redundancy and failover.

diffusion_risks: Failover logic complexity may cause diffusion if not well modularized within Teleoperation.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows strong containment of DP with minimal diffusion to other modules.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and link status logs is feasible within Teleoperation module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of link availability responsibility to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Monitor failover logic complexity and consider modularization if diffusion risk increases.
Clarify interface contracts between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution to reduce coupling.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignment meets the requirements for clarity, containment, and verification feasibility. No immediate need to further decompose or revise at this stage.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and report link failures promptly.
FR3: Recover or switch to backup link to maintain availability.
FR4: Log link availability metrics for evaluation.

revise.why: Current FR, DP, and IM assignments are consistent and well-aligned.

assumptions: Telemetry data is reliable for verification.
Failover logic can be implemented within Teleoperation module.
open_risks: Potential coupling with NGHE Solution via tasking interface.
evidence_needed: Telemetry logs demonstrating link availability over evaluation period.
